category_sources: source_facts.description says IUPAC International Chemical Identifier; InChI Trust download page describes generating InChI and the official code base.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is inchi; official InChI Trust and IUPAC repository use the stylized name InChI.
docs_sources: Official InChI Trust downloads page and official source-code documentation PDF are the best project documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the IUPAC International Chemical Identifier; source_facts.executables lists InChI command-line tools.
